subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letter was perused. An exposition and elucidation concerning the sacred verse "He taught him..." was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال مبارک نامه مرقوم ملحوظ گشت شرح و بسطی در ایه شریفه علمه
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause
